exploration_notes: CSRF protection in Django is implemented across three files: (1) django/middleware/csrf.py contains the CsrfViewMiddleware class with token validation logic (_check_token, _get_secret, process_view), token masking/unmasking helpers, and _does_token_match which delegates to constant_time_compare; (2) django/views/decorators/csrf.py defines the csrf_protect decorator by wrapping CsrfViewMiddleware via decorator_from_middleware; (3) django/utils/crypto.py provides constant_time_compare (wrapping se
